name: Paciolan Ticketing & Fan Engagement API
what_it_does: Paciolan Ticketing and Fan Engagement REST API for collegiate and professional venue ticketing, season ticket management, and fan engagement. Enables AI agents to manage season ticket holder account management for collegiate athletics ticketing, handle ticket inventory and pricing management for venue operations, access mobile ticketing and digital delivery for fan experience automation, retrieve donor integration and priority point management for collegiate athletics fundraising, manage group sales and premium seating for venue revenue management, handle event configuration and on-sale management for ticketing operations, access fan CRM and engagement data for personalized fan experience, retrieve revenue reporting and analytics for athletics business intelligence, manage integration with point-of-sale and access control for venue operations, and automate renewal billing and season ticket management for athletics business operations.
use_cases: Managing season ticket accounts from collegiate athletics agents
Automating ticket renewals from fan engagement agents
Integrating donor priority points from fundraising agents
Reporting ticket sales from athletics revenue agents
not_for: Professional sports without collegiate athletics context
Concert and festival venues without athletics ticketing
Small venues without enterprise ticketing requirements
best_when: A collegiate athletics department, arena, or performing arts venue using Paciolan wants AI agents to automate season ticket management, fan engagement, donor integration, and venue operations.
avoid_when: FERPA DONOR PRIVACY: Collegiate athletics donors are often alumni — donor and season ticket holder data may overlap with student records protected under FERPA; automated data sharing requires FERPA compliance review. NCAA compliance — automated ticket and donation bundling must comply with NCAA rules on donor benefits; improper ticket benefits to donors associated with prospective or current student-athletes creates NCAA compliance violations. PCI-DSS — automated ticket payment processing requires PCI-DSS compliance; cardholder data must not be stored in integration logs or agent memory.

auth.notes: Paciolan uses API key and OAuth 2.0 authentication. REST API with JSON. Irvine, California HQ. Comcast Spectacor acquired Paciolan (2011). Comcast Spectacor is a division of Comcast (CMCSA NASDAQ). Paciolan founded 1980. 150+ college and professional venues. Market leader in collegiate athletics ticketing. Competes with Ticketmaster and AXS for collegiate venue ticketing.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — annual venue subscription
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual venue license; per-ticket transaction fees
pricing.notes: Irvine, CA. Comcast Spectacor (Comcast). Founded 1980. 150+ college/professional venues. Collegiate athletics ticketing market leader. Competes with Ticketmaster for collegiate venues.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per API key; documented per venue integration

known_agent_gotchas: NCAA COMPLIANCE RISK: Automated ticket and donation bundling for donors with relationships to prospective or current student-athletes must comply with NCAA extra benefits rules; improper ticket benefits create NCAA violation risk

FERPA alumni/donor data — collegiate athletics donor and season ticket holder data overlaps with alumni records; FERPA protects student education records; automated donor data sharing requires FERPA compliance assessment
PCI-DSS ticket payment — automated ticket renewal and payment processing requires PCI-DSS compliance; cardholder data in payment automation must not be stored or logged

Priority point system complexity — collegiate athletics priority point systems for donor seating rights have institution-specific rules; automated priority point changes require understanding of specific institutional priority point policy
No webhooks — event and transaction notification requires polling; no native event push for ticket sales, renewals, or access control events
Mobile ticketing delivery — automated digital ticket delivery requires integration with mobile wallet (Apple Wallet, Google Wallet); delivery failures require retry and alternative delivery channel
agent_readiness.security_notes: Collegiate venue ticketing. SOC2, PCI-DSS. API key/OAuth2. US. Season ticket and donor data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Collegiate ticketing. SOC2, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. US. Ticket and donor data.
